125. Identify following life cycle pattern and
that pattern shown in (Pg42, E)
Sporuphyte
2v, Pa
- a
Melosis
Cham a=
n .
\L Oamectoptyte Ha
[2
A) Haplontic life cycle eg: Volvox
B) Haplodiplontic lifecycle eg: Ectocarpus,
Psilotum
C) Haplodiplontic lifecycle eg: Fucus,
Marchantia
D) Diplontic lifecycle eg: Bryophytes,
Pteridophytes
